summary: Plan-only construction website proposal. Project type is website. Cost estimate is 0 USD for local dry-run planning.

tasks.description: Classify the command as a website build request for a construction business context.
Prepare a future site structure plan with pages, sections, quality gates, and approval gates before any build work.
List gates for any future build, deployment, domain, paid tool, credential, or live-service work.

approvalGates.reason: Building files for a new website requires a separate owner-approved scope.
Any staging or production deployment requires owner approval and rollback planning.
Any domain or DNS change requires owner approval.
Any paid tool or live API use requires owner approval and cost ledger review.

expectedOutput: Validated plan-only record chain proving AG OS can classify and plan a website request without live actions.
